theScene: Having defeated Ancilla, you push open the ornate doors to the final chamber.
...Slowly and loudly, you might add. The hinges are in desperate need of oiling. Eventually, you manage to push them open enough to walk through.

The room you enter is vastly different than anything else you've seen in the dungeon so far, with the thick scent of sensual perfume wafting in the air, and the walls decorated with flowing tapestries of pink, red, and dark purple.
Dominating the center of the room is a large bed in the shape of a heart, covered in dozens of luxurious looking pillows.
I am Sofia, first commander of the Demon Queen! Who dares to disturb my slumber?
There is someone in the bed!
She slowly rises from the bed, sensually stretching her arms.
She looks at you, rubbing her eyes before yawning cutely.
No, seriously, who are you? I was having such a great dream... Ugh, why does that door have to be so loud...?
I am [ThePlayerName], and I have come to defeat you to get-
Blah, blah, blah. You're an adventurer and you're here for the sigil, right?
She points to a large barrel next to the entrance of the room that appears to be filled with small heart shaped badges encrusted with a single large heart shaped gem.
At least you think they're gems. They seem... tacky.
Go on, take one and get out of here. You beat my maid, so you've already proven yourself. I just want to go back to sleep...
She flops back onto the bed with very little grace before cuddling a pillow.
Having defeated Ancilla, you push open the ornate doors to the final chamber.
...Slowly and loudly, you might add. The hinges are in desperate need of oiling. Eventually, you manage to push them open enough to walk through.
The room you enter is exactly as you remember it, with the thick scent of sensual perfume wafting in the air and the walls decorated with flowing tapestries of pink, red, and purple.
Dominating the center of the room is a large bed in the shape of a heart, covered in dozens of luxurious looking pillows.
I am Sofia, first commander of the Demon Queen! Who dares to disturb my slumber?
Sofia slowly rises from the bed, sleepily stretching her arms.
She looks at you, rubbing her eyes before yawning cutely.
Oh, it's you again... Ugh, why does that door have to be so loud...?
You going to take your sigil this time?
She flops back onto the bed with very little grace before cuddling a pillow.
Ughhh, no it's not... Take a sigil and buzz off.
She buries her face deeper into the pillow.
You beat Ancilla, so take a sigil already. If I fought you, you wouldn't stand a chance.
She buries her face deeper into the pillow.
As you slowly start to approach the bed, intent on fighting Sofia, she slowly pushes herself up with her arms and glares at you.
Additionally the pillow she was snuggling with is now stuck on one of her horns, fluff falling out of it as she moves her gaze to glare contemptuously at it.
Sighing in annoyance, she takes the pillow off her horn and throws it into a pile in the corner, filled with many other pillows that seem to have met with a similar fate.
You seriously want to do this? Really? I will actually destroy you. Well, your dick. In a good way.
You are hit with a sudden wave of lust as you approach her.
I suppose I should go easy on you...
Are you {i}really{/i} sure you want to do this?
'...Maybe I'll just leave while I'm ahead.'

EventText.NameOfScene: '...Maybe I'll just leave while I'm ahead.'
theScene: You turn and head back towards the barrel full of sigils as Sofia flops back down onto her bed.
You continue your approach, determined to beat Sofia.
Fine, be that way. But I'm going to beat you by just kissing you, and maybe just a bit of magic.
I'll try to not get carried away.♥
Well I can't say I was expecting that! I suppose not every adventurer is {i}completely{/i} worthless.
Well I think you deserve a reward...
With a grin, you go and collect your rightfully earned sigil.
No not one of those, you fool...
Though I suppose you should take one of those too.
Anyways, choose wisely. Because if you want to earn another one, I'll be trying harder to beat you.
You take one of the sigils from the barrel and store it away. Victory!

Then, hearing a low sleepy grumble from Sofia who has apparently returned to napping, you turn back towards the Forest Dungeon boss... and your heart skips a beat at the alluring sight in front of you.

The succubus is languidly lying on her giant bed with her surprisingly adorable sleeping face buried in a pillow, while her enticing wide hips and plump derriere are wantonly raised up high in the air, leaving her smooth thighs and exquisitely shaped ass fully exposed, her skimpy lingerie not covering anything and only serving to frame her wondrous curves, drawing your gaze to them...

Your heart skipping a beat at the sexy sight, you can't help but watch slack-jawed as she unconsciously sways her rear back and forth temptingly amid more sleepy mumbles, her unbearably erotic slumbering form surrounded in an alluring pink haze of pheromones that further entice you as you take a gulp of their sweet fragrance with a gasp, your pants tenting from your erection pointing straight at the woman's defenseless pussy...
You escape the dungeon with the first of the four sigils and return to town!
